# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - name: sql-instance
    type: gcp.sql.instances
    properties:
      settings:
        tier: db-f1-micro
      databaseVersion: POSTGRES_12
      region: us-central1

  - name: storage-bucket
    type: gcp.storage.buckets
    properties:
      location: US

  - name: compute-instance-template
    type: gcp.compute.instanceTemplates
    properties:
      machineType: f1-micro
      diskConfig:
        initializeParams:
          sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-10
      networkInterfaces:
        - network: global/networks/default
      disks:
        - deviceName: boot
          type: PERSISTENT
          autoDelete: true
          boot: true

  - name: managed-instance-group
    type: gcp.compute.instanceGroupsManaged
    properties:
      baseInstanceName: my-instance
      instanceTemplate: $(ref.compute-instance-template)
      targetSize: 2
      namedPorts:
        - name: http
          port: 80

  - name: firewall-rule
    type: gcp.compute.firewalls
    properties:
      name: allow-http-traffic
      direction: INGRESS
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports: [80]
      targetTags: [web]

  - name: forwarding-rule
    type: gcp.compute.forwardingRules
    properties:
      name: http-forwarding-rule
      targetPool: $(ref.target-pool)
      protocol: TCP
      portRange: '80'

  - name: target-pool
    type: gcp.compute.targetPools
    properties:
      name: my-target-pool
      region: us-central1

  - name: health-check
    type: gcp.compute.healthChecks
    properties:
      name: http-health-check
      checkIntervalSec: 5
      timeoutSec: 5
      healthyThreshold: 2
      unhealthyThreshold: 2
      type: HTTP
      port: 80
      requestPath: /
